name: Alex Conant, MarcoRubio.com
subject: Democrat: Rubio Is ‘Dangerous’
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44028459:6zhCYsLNq:m:1:1349778030:32ED375AA3DC8936BED70BE2554732E4:r)
---
| | | | Peter, From day one, the Democrats have been worried about having to face Marco Rubio in the general election. Marco's optimistic message about our country's future stands in stark contrast to the failed ideas and same leaders from yesterday, as represented by Hillary Clinton. Marco reminded Democrats of this fact during last Wednesday's debate at the Ronald Reagan Presidential Library. Yesterday, a top Democrat from South Carolina re-issued the warning. Check out this transcript from CNN's State of the Union:
---
| BAKARI SELLERS (D-SC): Marco Rubio scares me. He is a dangerous general election candidate and I thought he did very well . . . JAKE TAPPER: You mean, just to clarify, dangerous in the sense that you fear he could be a strong candidate? SELLERS: I mean dangerous is that one day he could be the 45th President of the United States.
---
| And if you watched the debate on Wednesday, you'll agree: Marco is the best Republican to take on Hillary Clinton -- or whomever the Democrats nominate -- in 2016. Now, Marco needs our help to make that a reality. [**Click here to make an immediate donation of $7 to help make Democrats' worst nightmare come true by ensuring that Marco wins the Republican nomination.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44028460:6zhCYsLNq:m:1:1349778030:32ED375AA3DC8936BED70BE2554732E4:r) Alex ConantCommunications DirectorMarco Rubio for President
---
| | | | | [**DONATE** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44028460:6zhCYsLNq:m:1:1349778030:32ED375AA3DC8936BED70BE2554732E4:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---

name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: This is a big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
"If I were in charge of Congress, I'd put forward spending and I would say, this is what it is. And if Democrats don't vote for it, then Democrats would be shutting down government." \-- Rand Paul, _Face the Nation_ , 9/21/2015
Fellow Conservative,

I could not be more serious when I state that this Republican Congress must not pass a budget that funds Planned Parenthood.

I'm promising my willingness to lead.

That's why I won the Mackinac Island Republican Leadership Conference straw poll on Saturday -- the biggest straw poll of the year.

But with the September 30th FEC reporting deadline just nine days away, building on this momentum is crucial.

**[Can I count on you to help me fight back against their attacks by chipping in a contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30527788:Wk31uamNX:m:1:879035888:01DDA53689D14202C233E20E7D69CCEC:r)**?

Establishment politicians in both parties are already making excuses for funding Planned Parenthood.

But I believe we should force the Democrats to explain their extremist position that an organization that dissects babies to harvest their organs should hold the budget hostage.

Barack Obama, Hillary Clinton and the rest of the Democrat Party can explain to the American people why they shut down the government.

This is going to require real leadership in Washington.

And I'm willing to spearhead this fight -- even if it means taking on members of my own party!

But I need you in my corner.

**[So please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help me fight back against the Washington Machine and keep up the momentum](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30527788:Wk31uamNX:m:1:879035888:01DDA53689D14202C233E20E7D69CCEC:r)**.

Despite the establishment and their pals in the liberal press attacking me and silencing my message of liberty at every opportunity, my campaign continues to gain momentum.

But standing up to the Washington Machine doesn't make me the most popular guy in Washington.

So the gatekeepers in the liberal media are certain to come at me with everything they've got.

That's why I really need you in my corner during this critical time.

**[Please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help me fight the Washington Machine and ensure my message breaks through the gatekeepers' wall of silence](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30527788:Wk31uamNX:m:1:879035888:01DDA53689D14202C233E20E7D69CCEC:r)**.

Thank you in advance for your support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30527789:Wk31uamNX:m:1:879035888:01DDA53689D14202C233E20E7D69CCEC:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30527790:Wk31uamNX:m:1:879035888:01DDA53689D14202C233E20E7D69CCEC:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30527791:Wk31uamNX:m:1:879035888:01DDA53689D14202C233E20E7D69CCEC:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30527792:Wk31uamNX:m:1:879035888:01DDA53689D14202C233E20E7D69CCEC:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30527788:Wk31uamNX:m:1:879035888:01DDA53689D14202C233E20E7D69CCEC:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30527788:Wk31uamNX:m:1:879035888:01DDA53689D14202C233E20E7D69CCEC:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30527793:Wk31uamNX:m:1:879035888:01DDA53689D14202C233E20E7D69CCEC:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30527794:Wk31uamNX:m:1:879035888:01DDA53689D14202C233E20E7D69CCEC:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30527795:Wk31uamNX:m:1:879035888:01DDA53689D14202C233E20E7D69CCEC:r)

| Friend,

Big news! Ted will be on the **Late Show with Stephen Colbert on CBS tonight at 11:35 pm ET** \-- you won't want to miss it!

Also this afternoon, Ted will appear on **Your World with Neil Cavuto on Fox News at 4 pm ET**.

So be sure to tune in to Fox News this afternoon and CBS tonight and don't forget to tell your friends!

Some more news: momentum continues to build after last week's second Republican presidential debate. As you may recall after the first debate, the campaign saw a surge of support -- raising $1 million in the 100 hours following the debate. We're proud to annouce that after the second debate, [**we raised another $1 million, _but this time in only 48 hours_**](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjwRjWceNKx7DFgbhqre9vtw_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHvpCw4bThj-2FgSIdmOtwiaEh7PiT-2BxlbYWmpKG8SJt-2BnPEFiTf0cmCBJYJS7c-2BqWNWvjAckN66909-2BK284ny4U6Kqa0s05Xs6uiLBlDIfA56zWpMhHRIzd-2BH450zOXFUGbaIKdJfYkEN0QQoluKGGrYc-2Bq84Cj70WP7AXeVBV4VLDMPjLA60K1CvN6fec7TPeG71NMsQYWYmLH1ABAZYDVvtuW4JB1ckv5Yvw8sr7lqvfMZcECvQQOseA3urk82pzRt-2Fnh0yLygd8SOJ-2BxxiBIWmVMZkrzCzxR3X-2FsgYuoqTO3J7QLGkvgFDJQd4C8ZnmgeY4PjyxoK82oPM-2BKCYvhi-2F7sLsv7Vv-2FLqApFfCfyU8GdL7nMVA180mE-2BDkwl-2FrRk-3D). So thank you for your support!

-Team Cruz

P.S. We also wanted to share video of Ted speaking at the [Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvDmsXkerJDy2RZ1-2B2iT1UH-2FvPyILjZGLHFGVzC6I0matg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHvpCw4bThj-2FgSIdmOtwiaEFgydm-2F4QouZC3sclPB02C8a5Sq2EWPA0DomJdGLqMhTa3FB3VFZ85tIp-2Bb1KG-2FHDvX2SPNuAFF2qVKH3Ms5VAZaYQuX2YVlemj-2BlLk5j6vQN28zR14H64lLFCIgNOnXDQnqGtfVGXPct5UYfOLtE2uZZhISj6VhY-2BNHSNBOIhhFom4MmNLgbJHNLsyY5vNxrU0HkLl90decR3cBljFtEF5AHe53GqRwQajTLNVG8jLvJ5baPuYJnu621OiD1ze2uhMOqOjfwo-2FjU-2FXl3QG4mCX-2FsOsHYjPi4iZCYw-2FO9-2B-2BoSlkhKm2CpSMZnIdLwy3qx6ZhxhCsEcKx-2F9FneHCqijMp9RcU647WkOz-2Bpnx9tUf0-3D) and the [Iowa Faith and Freedom Coalition Fall Dinner](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvB7zFJ9QNxcAFCmG2zOGsnlpyf95GhTebirq5jAOjRp1g-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHvpCw4bThj-2FgSIdmOtwiaEJZR8sRYbGvgYJNENk-2Fte42c2c9NBw3zPUwlhy60l2JqMWR-2FuM6RfYdVqPSSvj1TfCv9hFGBX7d0PRN5vR2GPZ7Y2RSvVj0AOeZSH1zp-2BDI7d3Po9ZU7DCACj1Fkvdb1WXZgt7T25H8xFtHyFpcTVNUCtE-2B-2Fu7sN08cx1f7KHXBo5cnzg2Xifobl-2FpDuHljfAqzsqZ1mdr1WCcLBlQEi-2Bk-2B5N1WvsiCLqc0ujZqCfHd3xtEhv7kPN94Rz4nsDp9pfoswf3NRhubLiYnW2ejrRtBm4DWgRi0QeuSCQDxL0nVmLjX49lC5Y-2FHYlQ9OtgR3PwP5MuC8WmD3yWysqfPtteg6ZY-2Bw8PSdVaS7QH010yAc-3D) over the weekend with you. We hope you'll watch and share both!

name: Team Murphy
subject: The Kochs are scared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| **New Poll: Murphy is best Democrat to turn Florida blue** Friends,

A new poll shows that Patrick can do better against Republicans next November than his primary opponent can. Which confirms what we already knew -- **_in a general election, Patrick has the best shot to take this seat back for Democrats._**

**Republicans do NOT want Patrick 's name on the ballot next November.** And they're going to do whatever they can to knock him out early.

One Koch group has already attacked Patrick. Karl Rove's group, American Crossroads, has attacked him. These groups will pull out all the stops to knock Patrick out of this race.

**And we 're going to pull out all the stops to help Patrick fight back.**

[**Our big FEC deadline is only 9 days away. We 're still short of our $50,000 goal -- and we need to step up. Make a contribution right now.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae208b/738133e4/3a9bdaa6/7f8d23d6/1870189646/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150921?refcode=pme150921_a&recurring=true")

Republicans and their special interest friends have picked the Democrat they want to run against -- and it isn't Patrick.

**They 're scared of Patrick.** He's got a proven record of putting Florida families before everything else.

Patrick's ready to fight whatever ridiculous attacks come his way. We need to make sure we're ready to fight beside him.

[**With the FEC deadline coming up fast, we need to act quickly. Give $5 or more to help us reach our $50,000 goal.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae208b/738133e4/3a9bdaa6/7f8d23d6/1870189646/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150921?refcode=pme150921_a&recurring=true")

Thanks for standing with Patrick.

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae208b/738133e4/3a9bdaa6/7f8d23d7/1870189646/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: #Momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, our country needs a common-sense conservative in the White House. Gov. John Kasich is the only Midwestern governor in the race who can bring our values to Washington, D.C.

Gov. Kasich is the _only candidate_ that has the record to defeat Hillary.

**[Will you chip in $25, $50 or more right now to help us keep up our growing momentum?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30530690:sYtSEamWN:m:1:958431888:3D214D3B58909D858A592D2CF8D1AE9C:r)**

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30530691:sYtSEamWN:m:1:958431888:3D214D3B58909D858A592D2CF8D1AE9C:r)

**Need proof that we're on the rise? Here are some recent highlights: **

• Gov. Kasich is running at 3rd in New Hampshire and a recent poll showed he's the only candidate defeating Hillary in New Hampshire and Ohio.

• We've received some major endorsements and keep adding more each week. [Read more here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30530692:sYtSEamWN:m:1:958431888:3D214D3B58909D858A592D2CF8D1AE9C:r).

• Gov. Kasich placed 3rd in the prestigious Michigan straw poll this past weekend - ahead of Jeb Bush and Marco Rubio.

• A recent Iowa poll had Gov. Kasich virtually tied with both Jeb Bush and Marco Rubio and we just expanded our Iowa team.

• Hillary Clinton's campaign continues to attack Gov. Kasich, demonstrating what several of her strategists have said; they're most afraid of Gov. John Kasich.

**Peter, Gov. Kasich's campaign is on the rise and with your help, we can win**. Please chip in today to help!

[

](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30530691:sYtSEamWN:m:1:958431888:3D214D3B58909D858A592D2CF8D1AE9C:r)
Thank you for all that you're doing to help. Let's win!

**John Weaver
**Chief Strategist

P.S. In case you missed our highlight video of Gov. Kasich at the recent debate at the Ronald Reagan Library, [watch it here:](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30530693:sYtSEamWN:m:1:958431888:3D214D3B58909D858A592D2CF8D1AE9C:r)

John Kasich is the only Midwestern governor in the race who can bring our values to Washington, D.C. Gov. Kasich is the only candidate that has the record to defeat Hillary. Need proof that we're on the rise? Here are some recent highlights: • Gov. Kasich is running at 3rd in New Hampshire and a recent poll showed he's the only candidate defeating Hillary in New Hampshire and Ohio. • We've received some major endorsements and keep adding more each week. . • Gov. Kasich placed 3rd in the prestigious Michigan straw poll this past weekend - ahead of Jeb Bush and Marco Rubio. • A recent Iowa poll had Gov. Kasich virtually tied with both Jeb Bush and Marco Rubio and we just expanded our Iowa team. • Hillary Clinton's campaign continues to attack Gov. Kasich, demonstrating what several of her strategists have said; they're most afraid of Gov. John Kasich. Peter, Gov. Kasich's campaign is on the rise and with your help, we can win. Please chip in today to help! Thank you for all that you're doing to help. Let's win! John Weaver Chief Strategist P.S. In case you missed our highlight video of Gov. Kasich at the recent debate at the Ronald Reagan Library, Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 18, 2015. name: Team Van Hollen
subject: From The Front Lines: Full Steam Ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, As we head into fall, our campaign is charging full steam ahead. Our momentum continues to grow as Chris keeps meeting voters across Maryland to discuss their concerns and share his vision for moving our state and our country forward. **Back In Session:** Congress is back in session and Chris is once again at the center of the fight to prevent Republicans from shutting down the government, this time over Planned Parenthood funding. Last week [_**Chris introduced legislation to prevent a shutdown**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fe1/70cdc2ba/47ad4a02/3959307/3184358429/VEsH/ "http://thehill.com/policy/finance/253230-house-dems-unveil-bill-to-prevent-a-government-shutdown") that gives Republicans a choice: come to the table to work out a solution or get out of the way so our government can continue running. He is fighting hard for us to protect funding for critical government programs and to protect women's health services in Maryland and across the country. [_**_The Washington Post_**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fe1/70cdc2ba/47ad4a02/3959304/3184358429/VEsE/ "http://www.washingtonpost.com/news/the-fix/wp/2015/09/15/the-6-issues-that-could-cause-a-government-shutdown/") named Chris one of the top three "major players" in the fight to prevent Tea Party extremists from another costly and damaging government shutdown. Last week Chris also joined Moms Demand Action and Everytown for Gun Safety at a rally on the Mall to demand that we do whatever it takes to put an end to the daily toll of senseless gun violence that has gripped our streets and communities. Chris has joined these and other groups in calling upon the Republicans to allow a vote on common sense gun safety measures, including his bill to encourage states to require licenses for handgun purchases. **Our Grassroots Campaign:** When he is not on Capitol Hill addressing the challenges we all care about, Chris has been crisscrossing the state meeting with voters, listening to their concerns and talking about how we can work together to move Maryland and America forward. Since our last update, Chris has participated in scores of voter meet and greet events, parades, civic forums and community gatherings, and the reception Chris is getting has been overwhelmingly positive. Marylanders want to elect a Senator who can get things done on the issues they care about. [_**Click here to see our recent Facebook photo album of Chris around Maryland.**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fe1/70cdc2ba/47ad4a02/3959305/3184358429/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/media/set/?set=a.10153160904181732.1073741836.7320486731&type=1&l=c6dc49e766") And our team is also growing as we contact and organize supporters and friends across the state. We have a flood of volunteers at campaign headquarters every day who are excited to be working to elect Chris as our next Senator. They're making calls, knocking on doors, and doing whatever they can to get Chris's message out and let voters know about the choice we face in this election. In the coming months, more and more voters will begin to focus on the April 26 Primary. Thank you for continuing to reach out to your friends around the state and make sure they are tuned into our campaign and are able to attend one of the many Van Hollen organizing meetings taking place across the state. Thank you for being with us each step of the way. Team Van Hollen P.S. Don't miss out on additional updates from Chris and the campaign. Be sure to like us on Facebook and follow us on Twitter. | [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fe1/70cdc2ba/47ad4a02/3959302/3184358429/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD") | [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fe1/70cdc2ba/47ad4a02/3959303/3184358429/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/vanhollenformd")
---|---

[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fe1/70cdc2ba/47ad4a02/3959300/3184358429/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvhupdate?refcode=em0921update")

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fe1/70cdc2ba/47ad4a02/3959301/3184358429/VEsB/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: BREAKING: Scott Walker Drops Out of Presidential Race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Just this afternoon, news broke that Governor Scott Walker is suspending his campaign for the Republican presidential nomination.

As the Republican field continues to narrow, we must act fast and with all of our energy to keep up our momentum and capture the Republican nomination.

Today's news illustrates that without the necessary support from grassroots conservatives like you, no campaign can survive.

With the September 30th reporting deadline a little over one week away, it's vital I count on your support.

**[Will you consider an urgent donation of $20.16 right now to stand with me in our campaign to defeat the Washington Machine](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30532162:W6jZoamNC:m:1:879035888:B8826031A91D6C4F0A399F133CF036E0:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, these past few days has seen my campaign receive a boost of momentum.

I won the Michigan Republican Presidential Straw Poll and today I was proud to announce that I have received the endorsement of U.S. Congressman Mick Mulvaney from South Carolina.

I'm feeling very confident because I know our campaign has momentum and the organization necessary for the long haul.

My Fair and Flat Tax Plan would eliminate all 70,000 pages of the tax code and replace it with one low flat tax of 14.5%.

I am the only candidate who advocates a return to a common-sense conservative foreign policy of Ronald Reagan's "Peace through Strength."

I am the only candidate competing nationwide from Maine to Alaska and the only candidate to visit Detroit and engage with voters previously ignored by the Republican establishment.

Simply put, I am the only candidate who can expand the Republican electorate, mobilize young voters, and defeat Hillary Clinton and the Washington Machine.

My campaign has the momentum and the right message, but it needs your support.

**[Will you chip in $20.16 to help spread my message to fellow conservatives](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30532162:W6jZoamNC:m:1:879035888:B8826031A91D6C4F0A399F133CF036E0:r)**?

While you and I know that our message is the strongest, we cannot count on the establishment media to do us any favors.

To win, we need to out-work all of our opponents.

Your financial support today will go directly to mobilize voters and prepare the infrastructure necessary to win.

Can I count on you?

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30532163:W6jZoamNC:m:1:879035888:B8826031A91D6C4F0A399F133CF036E0:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30532164:W6jZoamNC:m:1:879035888:B8826031A91D6C4F0A399F133CF036E0:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30532165:W6jZoamNC:m:1:879035888:B8826031A91D6C4F0A399F133CF036E0:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30532166:W6jZoamNC:m:1:879035888:B8826031A91D6C4F0A399F133CF036E0:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30532162:W6jZoamNC:m:1:879035888:B8826031A91D6C4F0A399F133CF036E0:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30532162:W6jZoamNC:m:1:879035888:B8826031A91D6C4F0A399F133CF036E0:r)

name: Claire & Zack, Bernie 2016
subject: Host a Bernie debate watch party
body:
#
Dear Friend,
On October 13th, during the first Democratic presidential debate, the whole nation will finally have a chance to hear Bernie's message about taking this country back from the billionaire class.
We want to use the first Democratic debate to **[host thousands of Debate Watch Parties](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb22ab/43f17890/58c49e6b/621c142d/4072633431/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/create")** , where supporters like you open up their homes (or another place in your community) to other Bernie supporters.
**[Please help take our movement to the next level by hosting a Debate Watch Party on Tuesday, October 13!](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb22ab/43f17890/58c49e6b/621c142d/4072633431/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/create")**
We'll accomplish two important goals with these events:
* Have fun watching the debate with other Bernie supporters
* Put thousands of new volunteers to work by signing them up at your party for events in your community

Already 800 people have scheduled Debate Watch Parties, but we need thousands more! In some areas, all of our July 29th events were completely full, even though there were 3,700 events nationwide. People had to be turned away from venues and homes that were full to capacity. So for this round of big events, we want to make sure we have enough room for everybody!
We're using these Debate Watch Parties to funnel tens of thousands of new volunteers into voter registration events and other voter contact events that will be pre-planned and on the map. This is how we're both growing our movement and turning it into an organization that can actually win the election.
At your party, your one special assignment will be to ask all your guests to sign up for an event. Those events will already be listed on the website, so it'll be easy for people to sign up.
Otherwise, your job hosting a Debate Watch Party is very easy: Help people enjoy themselves, meet each other and become a part of this growing movement while watching Bernie triumph at the first Democratic debate.
**Please schedule an event today at your home to make sure everyone has a way to watch the first Democratic presidential debate with other Bernie supporters on October 13th.**
**[Click here to post your event for an October 13th National Debate Watch Party.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb22ab/43f17890/58c49e6b/621c142d/4072633431/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/create")**
It's an honor working alongside you!
Claire Sandberg and Zack Exley
Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb22ab/43f17890/58c49e6b/621c142a/4072633431/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em150921debate-parties")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb22ab/43f17890/58c49e6b/621c142b/4072633431/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb22ab/43f17890/58c49e6b/621c1428/4072633431/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb22ab/43f17890/58c49e6b/621c1429/4072633431/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb22ab/43f17890/58c49e6b/621c13d6/4072633431/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: Dear Friend, On October 13th, during the first Democratic presidential debate, the whole nation will finally have a chance to hear Bernie's message about taking this country back from the billionaire class. We want to use the first Democratic debate to "" , where supporters like you open up their homes (or another place in your community) to other Bernie supporters. "" We'll accomplish two important goals with these events: Have fun watching the debate with other Bernie supporters Put thousands of new volunteers to work by signing them up at your party for events in your community Already 800 people have scheduled Debate Watch Parties, but we need thousands more! In some areas, all of our July 29th events were completely full, even though there were 3,700 events nationwide. People had to be turned away from venues and homes that were full to capacity. So for this round of big events, we want to make sure we have enough room for everybody! We're using these Debate Watch Parties to funnel tens of thousands of new volunteers into voter registration events and other voter contact events that will be pre-planned and on the map. This is how we're both growing our movement and turning it into an organization that can actually win the election. At your party, your one special assignment will be to ask all your guests to sign up for an event. Those events will already be listed on the website, so it'll be easy for people to sign up. Otherwise, your job hosting a Debate Watch Party is very easy: Help people enjoy themselves, meet each other and become a part of this growing movement while watching Bernie triumph at the first Democratic debate. Please schedule an event today at your home to make sure everyone has a way to watch the first Democratic presidential debate with other Bernie supporters on October 13th. "" It's an honor working alongside you! Claire Sandberg and Zack Exley Bernie 2016 "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
